label: Ability give hediff (psychic)
description: Psychic variant that applies a hediff to the target pawn.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# AbilityCompProperties type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

compClass.label: Component class
compClass.description: Runtime AbilityComp class. Usually set by the constructor.

applicableToMechs.label: Applicable to mechs
applicableToMechs.description: Whether this comp applies to mechanoids.

applyGoodwillImpactToLodgers.label: Apply goodwill impact to lodgers
applyGoodwillImpactToLodgers.description: Whether goodwill impact applies to lodgers.

canTargetBosses.label: Can target bosses
canTargetBosses.description: Whether this comp can target boss pawns.

clamorType.label: Clamor type
clamorType.description: ClamorDef produced when this ability fires.

screenShakeIntensity.label: Screen shake intensity
screenShakeIntensity.description: Intensity of the screen shake when the ability fires.

soundMale.label: Sound (male)
soundMale.description: SoundDef played when caster is male.

soundFemale.label: Sound (female)
soundFemale.description: SoundDef played when caster is female.

customLetterLabel.label: Custom letter label
customLetterLabel.description: Label for the letter sent when this comp fires.

customLetterText.label: Custom letter text
customLetterText.description: Body text for the letter sent when this comp fires.

sendLetter.label: Send letter
sendLetter.description: Whether to send a letter when this comp fires.

message.label: Message
message.description: Message shown in the bottom-left when this comp fires.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: AI selection weight for this comp.

availableWhenTargetIsWounded.label: Available when target is wounded
availableWhenTargetIsWounded.description: Whether the ability is available when the target is already wounded.

canTargetBaby.label: Can target baby
canTargetBaby.description: Whether this comp can target babies.

durationMultiplier.label: Duration multiplier
durationMultiplier.description: StatDef whose value multiplies the effect duration.

durationSecondsOverride.label: Duration seconds override
durationSecondsOverride.description: Overrides the duration in seconds. FloatRange; zero means use stat-based duration.

onlyBrain.label: Only brain
onlyBrain.description: Whether to apply the hediff only to the brain.

applyToSelf.label: Apply to self
applyToSelf.description: Whether to also apply to the caster.

onlyApplyToSelf.label: Only apply to self
onlyApplyToSelf.description: Whether to apply only to the caster.

applyToTarget.label: Apply to target
applyToTarget.description: Whether to apply to the target.

replaceExisting.label: Replace existing
replaceExisting.description: Whether to replace an existing instance of the hediff.

ignoreSelf.label: Ignore self
ignoreSelf.description: Whether the caster is ignored when applying.
